title: Prospect Game
description: A game that simulates the decision making process of a person in a risky situation. The game is based on the prospect theory, which is a behavioral economic theory that describes how people make decisions under risk.

title: Genre Prediction Based on Reviews
description: Made during DataHacks 2025, this project uses natural language processing to predict the genre of a video game genre based on its reviews.

title: League of Legends Action Analysis
description: This project uses the Riot Games API to analyze how action-packed a League of Legends esports match is. The project uses a combination of data analysis and machine learning to predict the outcome of a match based on the actions that occur during the game.

title: OpenCLIP Image Classification
description: This project uses the OpenCLIP model to classify images into different categories. It leverages the power of contrastive learning to achieve high accuracy in image classification tasks.

title: Target Receipts Redesign
description: Redesigned Target receipts to be more user-friendly and visually appealing. The redesign includes a new layout, improved typography, and the addition of icons to make it easier for customers to understand their purchases and savings.

title: Why Esports is on the Rise
description: A presentation that explores the reasons behind the rise of esports and its impact on the gaming industry. One of the key factors discussed in the presentation are the players and the storylines that are created around them.

title: Personal Website
description: Final Website project for COGS 3. This website is a portfolio of my work and projects. It includes a brief introduction about myself, a list of my projects, and my mission statement.

title: Choose Your Own Adventure Story
description: A choose your own adventure story that I collaborated on with a group of peers. The story involves topics based on the course material of CAT 3 and explores dystopian themes.

title: Winning Ways in the NBA
description: A project that compares offensive and defensive statistics of NBA teams to determine which is more important for winning games. The project uses data analysis techniques to analyze the statistics and make predictions about the importance of offense and defense in winning games.

title: K-Nearest Neighbors Algorithm
description: This project uses different python packages to implement the K-Nearest Neighbors algorithm for classification tasks. The project includes a comparison of different implementations of the algorithm and an analysis of their performance on different datasets.

title: Perceptron & Logistic Regression
description: This project implemenats a perceptron and logistic regression model from scratch using python and other supporting packages. The project includes an analysis of the performance of the models on different datasets and a comparison of their strengths and weaknesses.

title: Friends Final Project
description: A final project for DSC 10 that analyzes the TV show Friends. The project includes parsing text data from the show, analyzing the relationships betweeen character diaglogue using pandas and numpy.
